business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number WC-HCHP-2025-3350, effective 05/01/2025. Prior carriers: Markel Corporation (2023, premium $619,820.26, 3 claims, no cancellation); Zurich Insurance Group (2022, premium $607,294.45, 6 claims, cancelled). 285 full-time and 165 part-time employees.

positives: Written contracts maintained with all subcontractors
Written indemnification contracts required from all contractors
Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
All 8 premises locations reported as fully sprinklered
16 years in business with consistent management tenure
No commercial co-occupancy within hotel buildings
concerns: Plumbing and electrical systems original from 2005 — not updated in over 20 years
Short-term rentals (less than 1 year) permitted — elevated liability exposure
Buildings may not fully meet NFPA 13 or 13R sprinkler standards per Q9 response
No quality control/quality assurance program in place
OSHA citations received within the past 3 years
No cyber liability protections in place
Significant claims spike in 2024: 11 claims vs. 3 in 2023
Policy cancellation by prior carrier Zurich Insurance Group in 2022
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, and amenities present — slip/fall and premises liability exposure
EV charging stations installed — additional electrical fire and liability exposure
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2024 (Travelers Companies): 11 claims, premium $686,236.25, no cancellation. 2023 (Markel Corporation): 3 claims, premium $619,820.26, no cancellation. 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group): 6 claims, premium $607,294.45, policy cancelled. Three-year total: 20 claims. Notable adverse trend with claims tripling from 2023 to 2024.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas. 16 years in business under consistent management. Portfolio includes 4 hotel properties (LOC-001: 604 Brazos St Austin 95,000 sqft built 2010; LOC-002: 112 College St San Antonio 142,000 sqft built 2006; LOC-003: 245 E Main St Fredericksburg 48,000 sqft built 1998; LOC-004: 1220 S Congress Ave Austin 62,000 sqft built 2015), 3 restaurant locations (LOC-005: 608 Brazos St Austin 8,500 sqft; LOC-006: 6550 Comanche Trail Austin 12,000 sqft; LOC-007: 303 Pearl Pkwy San Antonio 6,800 sqft), and 1 corporate office (LOC-008: 401 Congress Ave Suite 2800 Austin 6,200 sqft built 2008). 285 full-time and 165 part-time employees. Annual revenue $42,000,000. Corporate office hours: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. Written contracts maintained with all subcontractors. Written indemnification contracts required from all contractors. 24-hour doorperson/security on premises. Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) maintained. All 8 locations reported as fully sprinklered. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. HVAC replaced 2020. No OSHA citations — contradicted by Q13 answer of Yes (citations present within past 3 years).
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Three-year prior insurance history: 2024 — Travelers Companies, $686,236.25 premium, 11 claims, no cancellation. 2023 — Markel Corporation, $619,820.26 premium, 3 claims, no cancellation. 2022 — Zurich Insurance Group, $607,294.45 premium, 6 claims, policy cancelled. Premiums have increased approximately 13% over three years. Claims frequency increased sharply in 2024 (11 claims), representing a 267% increase over 2023.
